item.title: Easy No Bake Strawberry Cheesecake Cups for Warm Weather Treats
item.description: These no bake strawberry cheesecake cups are perfect for warm days when you want a cool, creamy dessert without turning on the oven. The fresh strawberries add a bright, juicy twist that makes every bite feel light and refreshing. Great for casual get-togethers or a quick sweet fix!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup graham cracker crumbs
  • 3 tablespoons unsalted butter, melted
  • 8 ounces cream cheese, softened
  • 1/2 cup powdered sugar
  • 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
  • 1 cup heavy whipping cream, chilled
  • 1 cup fresh strawberries, chopped
  • Extra whole strawberries for garnish
